def positive_custom_exception_encodes_identity_as_string_code_attribute():
    rule_id = "custom_exception_encodes_identity_as_string_code_attribute"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Custom exception stores its error identity as a plain string code attribute instead of sub-classing."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
